title: pyrrosia obovata
intro: Pyrrosia obovata, also known as the Chinese ladder fern or Chinese shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Pyrrosia obovata include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve immune function, and reduce inflammation, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. Pyrrosia obovata is often prepared as a decoction or a tincture, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to make herbal supplements.
